contradiction_text: Agentic pull requests outperform human pull requests on commit-level description alignment but perform slightly worse on PR-level alignment, so description quality is not consistently better across levels.
related_claim_texts: Agentic pull requests outperformed human pull requests on commit-level description alignment, but scored slightly worse on PR-level alignment between the PR description and its commits.
disclosure: Keep visible that agents look stronger on local commit-to-patch description while trailing slightly on whole-PR summarization, and that these results rest on proxy quality measures that may miss factual correctness.
